hotel_name: Trang Vu Homestay Cu Lao Cham

reviews.title: For the weekend
reviews.text: Just OK, but do not expect anything fancy. Shared shower :-(

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.positives:
I’m not sure why people before so excited. 
It was strange, no one knows English and doesn’t look like the pictures.
Sorry but just disappointing. Good A.C
reviews.negatives:
The bathroom has half wall. (You can smell everything in the room) And the water from the sink just getting out next to the toilet.
Also we couldn’t find a way to use hot water in the shower.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The cost is very reasonable for staying on the island.

reviews.title: While we enjoyed Chàm Island and our stay with this lovely family, the poor bed and wifi disappointe
reviews.positives: The family who ran the Homestay were kind, generous and helpful. The mom made us a lovely lunch free of charge, and they always had their special island tea ready for us to drink. The location was good…close to restaurants and the harbour village one way, and to a nice swimming beach in the other direction.
reviews.negatives: The bed was very hard and uncomfortable. The wifi was unusable in the room.

reviews.title: One night stay in Chăm Island
reviews.text: The room was clean and very basic. Had a restroom and shower within the room which was great. The water filter machine was nice too. Wish they had a tea kettle and / or mini refrigerator. Nice staff. No restaurants or tap hóa anywhere near.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very nice room with big window and comfortable bed.

reviews.title: So so
reviews.text: so so

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff was no lovely and tremendously helpful. The location is perfect, a couple of nice restaurants nearby.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately, the jacuzzi didn’t work during our stay. I hope it has been fixed now.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Friendly owner ... Will be back again soon

reviews.title: Very friendly & helpful
reviews.positives: Location was excellent, the owners made everything so easy. And it was very clean & comfortable. Unfortunately we could only stay the one night as the boats were grounded on our preferred departure date.

reviews.title: Great homestay with nice family
reviews.text: We enjoyed our stay at trang vu homestay and on cham island that much, that we stayed 3 nights longer than we planed before. Very nice family!

reviews.title: A homestay that truly makes you feel like home
reviews.positives: I felt immediately at home! I stayed during a special time, a few days ahead of Tết, the Vietnamese New Year, which was a true gift. I got invited to a year-end-lunch the moment I arrived, and from thereon was cared for in multiple ways, whether by renting a motorbike, helping me with my SIM card, and just overall providing an atmosphere of warmth and openness. I had to change the room because of a maintenance issue, which was completely fine. It’s simple and perfect to for a stay like mine, I deeply enjoyed the beauty and spaciousness of the island, and the many encounters with the people.

reviews.title: Homely stay
reviews.text: A very homely and clean stay on a bizarre yet intriguing island. Beats the competition, highly recommend it!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Beautiful island and the host helped us navigate and make it to our destinations on time. Very convenient location close to the harbor. The rooms were clean and had good AC, and the host was very friendly and made us feel at home

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Extremely friendly host

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The owner is super friendly, she gave us a beautiful bracelet and a necklace as a parting gift which is really sweet.She let me take her motorbike for free to get to the harbor.

reviews.title: Serene but very noisy location
reviews.text: Rooms were great and the dinner was good value, but the darn KARAOKE that was playing nearby was painful. Maybe a hundred metres away a bar was blasting these awful tunes until about 10pm. We had pictured more of a quiet getaway. Not to mention in the morning, a loud PA announcement came on at about 6AM and went on for about half an hour. Great little place but for the soundtrack

reviews.title: Idyllic
reviews.positives: My favorite place that we’ve stayed in Vietnam. Beautiful views from the front, amazingly welcoming and kind owners and great location. We were looked after from the minute we stepped in and felt at home. Free water and basic but comfortable rooms.
reviews.negatives: Nothing, I wish we could’ve stayed longer.

reviews.title: Nice Homestay-clean small rooms- friendly people
reviews.text: We experenced a little bit the way of living of Cham  cultur.  Very pure and natural. Silent Island with nice beaches.  Motorbike riding wasn't possible.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: No está funcionando ,por obras
reviews.negatives: Nadie me informo que está en off temporalmente

reviews.title: A great trip to Cham Island.
reviews.text:
I'll surely miss this place and I'd like to come back there very soon.

I did book a room in Ms. Trang homestay for one night at first but the host family and the environment on this island were extremely charming, so I decided to extend my holiday in there. The prices in the island generally were reasonable and the local people there were super nice and helpful to me. Ms. Trang was so kind that she showed me what to eat and where to visit in detailed, which made my trip greater. The host family's house is pretty large and it's cleaned very usually. They even own a boat, which would carry you to go fishing and snorkeling. The room was good enough for me with quite full of convenience and wi-fi connection as well. The location is near the village and Bai Ong beach. To conclude, it's really worth spending money and time there.
(-) I was only unpleasant with the windows because they didn't have any wind-resistant tools for windows, so I couldn't open the window.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: No dormimos en este alojamiento proque no le quedavan habitaciones cuando lleganos debido a un problema con los aires aconsicionados. Nos consiguieron al momento una habitacion igual en el hotel de al lado. I màs barata.

reviews.title: very friendly and nice hosts
reviews.text: We got picked up from the slow boat ferry, the family is nice and friendly and makes affords. Only that they dont speak english,so communication is more with pantomimics,but works well. For vegetarian food u shoild know how to say "an chay". At midday, around 1:30/2p.m. they offet you a boattrip to a bay for swimmimg and snorkeling. 3hrs

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.positives: Ubicación, precio

reviews.title: Home is very suitable for a solo trip.
reviews.text: The host is very enthusiastic and welcoming, the space is very cozy and friendly, and the road in front of the homestay is very beautiful.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nos fue a buscar al ferry , nos gestionó el billete y cenar comida casera

reviews.title: Peace and Quiet
reviews.text: stay here for the peace and quiet.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Familia super amable y hospitalaria. La habitación super amplia y con todo lo que puedes necesitar. Solo pudimos estar una noche pero todo genial. Nos gestionaron la moto y todo fue genial. Volveremos!!

reviews.title: Peaceful location and beautiful hosts
reviews.text: Love this place.  It feels like being part of a nice family.

reviews.title: Buena estancia
reviews.positives:
Cerca del puerto.
Comodidad de la cama.
Mosquitera en la cama
Le propusimos que nos hiciera la cena, por 100000 cada person, riquísimo. A parte las bebidas.
reviews.negatives: La comunicación es algo difícil, a pesar de usar el traductor no nos entendimos. Pregunté para hacer snorkel con ellos, me dijo que le preguntaría a su hijo y jamás nos dijo nada...

reviews.title: The host is very friendly.
reviews.text: The homestay is located near the beach, with a clean and beautiful beach just a 5-minute walk away. I will come back to this place.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La atención, la ubicación, en general todo muy bien. Incluso el sándwich que preparó la host para mí y mi novia, que estaba delicioso.
reviews.negatives: El aire acondicionado dejó de funcionar a mitad de la noche, menos mal había un ventilador. Al principio había una cucaracha en la habitación, lo cual es normal por el tipo de hospedaje y no nos molestó sacarla

reviews.title: Great location and amenities
reviews.text:
Great stay at this homestay!
We were able to rent scooters as well as masks and snorkels to explore the island, which made our trip really easy and enjoyable.

The hosts gave us great local recommendations, and the welcome was very warm, with food and drinks provided upon arrival.

I definitely recommend this place!

reviews.title: Buenas playas muy cerca y autentica isla para descansar y tomar el sol
reviews.positives:
Muy amables y el chico habla ingles y me ayudo con los tikets del barco.
Hice una dalida bien de precio para ver coral y me alquilaron una moto para poder recorer la isla
reviews.negatives: Todo correcto para ser en ina isla

reviews.title: perfect island trip
reviews.text: Everyone who came for a single night decided to stay longer, sums it up perfectly

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Que nos han tratado como familia y han hecho todo lo posible y más para que estemos cómodos y resolvemos cualquier inconveniente. Vu y si familia son adorables!

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text: We booked 3 nights here and ended up staying for 6. The place is clean, quite, and comfortable. A Great value for the money. The host family is wonderful and made us feel at home during our stay. We were given fruit, snacks, and tea almost daily, as well as a complimentary homecooked dinner after extending our stay.  We were able to rent scooters and snorkel gear from them as needed at a very reasonable cost and with discounts for multiple day usage. I would definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: El trato de la familia es muy cercano. Siempre nos esperaban con un detalle, una sonrisa y ganas de hablar incluso con la barrera del idioma. Las instalaciones limpias y los baños nuevos. Ubicación muy buena, a 8 minutos andando del puerto. Además, nos llevaron y trajeron en moto! A 5 minutos andando de la playa

reviews.title: Warm and welcoming
reviews.text: I highly recommend this homestay for travellers who need a basic room and private toilet. The guesthouse also owns a boat so possibility of excursion. The staff are very friendly and very generous. They always give you food and we were invited to a fish dinner free of charge on top of all the fruit and tea they always give you when they bump into you. Free drinking water is also provided. Possibility to rent a motorbike and snorkelling gear.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
La família con la que nos alojamos fueron increiblemente atentos y nos ayudaron con Todo.
Guardamos un recuerdo increïble.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The owner is quite enthusiastic, even lending a motorcycle for going home; the room is clean and has a window for ventilation.

reviews.title: A un paseo del centro
reviews.positives: Personal amable, que nos llevó en moto al muelle y nos hizo un pequeño regalo. Alojamiento cercano a una playa y a un paseo de distancia del centro
reviews.negatives: Que le faltaba un mueble o armario para poner la maleta

reviews.title: Great homestay
reviews.text: Very good welcome, attentive and very kind, we did not stay long but it was very pleasant. Not far from the pier and easy to find. A big point for the sandwiches offered before our departure by Ferry. If you want to have a good time on Cham Island, go there without hesitation.

reviews.title: Muy amables, limpio y cómodo!
reviews.positives: La madre del propietario fue muy amable, estuvo siempre atenta de que no nos faltara nada y nos ayudó con todo. Una noche le pedimos que nos hiciera una mariscada para cenar, estaba increible! Lo recomendamos 100%
reviews.negatives: Todo fue correcto

reviews.title: Amazing homestay for great price
reviews.text: I stayed for a week here and I only have good things to say about this homestay, a very friendly family working here who take care of you if there’s any issue. Very lovely people. I hope to be back some day.

reviews.title: Excelente
reviews.positives: La mujer que lleva el homestay es lo más. Tuvimos un problema con la reserva y nos puso en el homestay de su hermana, que estaba al lado. Fue súper atenta con todo. El desayuno buenísimo. Todo genial, el mejor sitio donde nos alojamos en Vietnam. Sin duda volveremos.

reviews.title: Very friendly, as family. I had a gift when coming home
reviews.text: Cheap food, boat, motorbike ...

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Es una casa familiar con habitaciones acondicionadas para el turismo. Son pequeñas pero tienen aire acondicionado y ventilador. En nuestro caso 2 camas grandes. El baño es como todos los de esta zona pero cumple su misión 😃.
La situación es buena a 6 minutos caminando del puerto dónde paran los Fast Boats y dónde está el ambiente de restaurantes y a 700m y 1km tiene dos playas muy bonitas.
La familia es encantadora y dispuesta a ayudar en todo momento a pesar de que no saben mucho inglés, pero lo soluciona el traductor.
Se mantuvieron en contacto con nosotros a través de Booking.
Nos contrataron el Fast Boat que no tuvimos que pagar por adelantado y nos fueron a buscar al puerto en 3 motos sin pedirlo.
Ha sido una experiencia auténtica que nos ha hecho parte de sus vidas y de la familia. La despedida fue emocionante.
reviews.negatives: Nada.

reviews.title: Peaceful and charming place
reviews.text: The family was really helpful. When I arrived at the island, they picked me up at the habour. The homestay is close to the beach and their neighbors prepare delicious food (selfmade rice noodles). My room was clean and I had a lovely view out of my window.

reviews.title: Me encanto
reviews.positives: Muy cerca del centro y de la playa. La dueña es un amor, super amable, se preocupo de que tuviera todo apañado para el ferry y hasta me llevo al embarcadero con la moto.
reviews.negatives: Nada

reviews.title: Excelent
reviews.text:
Nice helpfull family, Nice rooms, good breakfast and dinner too. Very nice beach 100 meters from accomodiation.
I totaly recomend!
Island is great. We were there only one tourist wich stay there overnight on the whole Island. 
Cham is in UNESCO and also tourists go there for one day tours... That is guaranty of amazing sceneries and untuched domestic people...

reviews.title: Una estancia de lo más acogedora
reviews.positives: Las habitaciones están muy bien. Están limpias y bien acondicionadas. Muy acogedor, cuando llegué me recibieron con un té, y el día que me fui llovía un mucho y me llevaron al puerto. Lo que agradecí mucho. Super recomendable!

reviews.title: So wondeful!
reviews.text: We had such a wonderful 2 nights here.. I wish I knew the sons name because he was so kind and helpful. They took wonderful care of us. They cooked amazing meals and took us out fishing and snorkeling on their boat. We loved it. Some people complained about the hard beds...and they were hard but I have never slept so well in my life so no complaints!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: El trato muy familiar, servicial, imcluso nos hicieron cenas de pescado local buenisisimaaaa, y a una de nosotras nos hizo una terapia tradicional... En fin perfecto

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Colchon demasiado duro, todo lo demas perfecto.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La amabilidad del personal fue inmejorable. La ubicación estaba genial porque estaba un poco apartada del puerto (pero cerca) y a menos de 5 minutos andando de la playa.

reviews.title: Auténtica homestay con buena comida
reviews.text:
Homestay sencilla regentada por una familia muy agradable. Estaba muy limpio, las camas cómodas y bien situada. 
Posibilidad de alquilar bicis o motos. 
Cenamos estupendamente marisco y pescado.
Te facilitan la actividad de snorkel, aunque en estos momentos no es con su barco. Esperemos que está situación se resulta pronto, ya que no nos parece justo que el beneficio del turismo se lo lleven agencias de fuera de la isla en vez de las familias de aquí.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: El personal es muy atento y te ayudan con cualquier cosa que necesites, me sentí muy agusto.

reviews.title: Simple et propre
reviews.text:
Petite chambre simple, mais propre. 
Famille très sympa et accueillante malgré le barrière de la langue (le fils parle un peu anglais)
Homestay un peu à l'écart du port, mais à quelques minutes à pied. Plusieurs restaurants sur le port. Et à quelques minutes à pied d'une très belle plage.
Endroit et île très paisible! On a passé un très moment

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
La simpatía y la amabilidad de la familia son bellísimas personas❤️❤️
Te alquilan moto,su marido tiene barco para hacer submarinismo o snorkel..
La limpieza,la comida  marisco fresco, el desayuno pamcake,huevos fritos,mango,etc
la cama muy amplia y cómoda ,cerca de la playa y ocio..
Un sitio muy recomendable para desconectar unos dias

reviews.title: Deux nuits à Cham Island
reviews.text: Nous avons passé deux nuits dans ce charmant homestay à deux minutes à pied de la plus belle plage de l’île (bai ong) et à cinq minutes à pied des très bons restaurants du port. L’hôte est adorable : elle loue des scooters à des prix très raisonnables et nous avons pu prolonger notre séjour sans avoir réservé à l’avance. Nous recommandons ce homestay propre, chaleureux et parfaitement localisé.

reviews.title: Familia encantadora y muy cómodo
reviews.positives: Tiene todo lo necesario para pasar unos días tranquilos en la isla, cama cómoda y grande, aire acondicionado, máquina de agua gratis!  La familia que lo gestiona es encantadora, nos recibieron  con fruta y bebidas, incluso nos invitaron a cenar una noche comida típica vietnamita deliciosa. reservamos con ellos un tour de snorkel,no vinos nada porque el mar estaba un poco movido pero el chico que nos llevó en el barco nos condujo incluso a otra isla para intentar que viéramos algo más. Volvería a este lugar sin duda

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.text:
Homestay très charmante. La chambre est propre.
La famille est très sympathique et bienveillante. 
Vous pouvez louez des scooters sur place mais le port de l'île est à 10 minutes à pied.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Lo mejor fue la atención recibida. Antes de ir ya estuvimos en contacto y nos gestionaron la reserva del barco rápido de ida y vuelta (400k por persona). Una vez allí nos fueron a recoger en moto, a pesar de que estaba a menos de 10 minutos andando del muelle, y nos recibieron con un plato de sandía. Al día siguiente reservamos un tour de snorkel y, aunque no estábamos muy seguros de si merecería la pena y si veríamos mucho más que en la propia isla, nos compensó con creces. ¡Hasta vimos una tortuga! Lo recomiendo: algo más de dos cosas de excursión fueron 800k a repartir entre nosotros dos y otra pareja de alemanes. Fue un recuerdo inolvidable.
Al volver del tour nos invitaron a cenar: una comida exquisita con pescado fresco. Alquilamos una moto por 150k/día incluyendo la gasolina. Y el día de irnos nos invitaron a comer de nuevo. Encantadores todos los de la familia. Las instalaciones son modestas pero cómodas y limpias. Camas cómodas y buen aire acondicionado. Tienen máquina para beber agua gratis. Entorno tranquilo a 5-10 minutos andando del centro del pueblo y a algo menos de una playa grande.
Quizá la mejor estancia que hemos tenido después de casi un mes de Vietnam. Con mucha pena de irnos de la isla y de este alojamiento.
reviews.negatives: Algunos comentarios hablan sobre la megafonía a las 5 de la mañana... En realidad son las noticias que retransmiten en el propio pueblo. Sorprende, pero hasta eso tiene encanto (aunque te haga abrir los ojos tan pronto...)

reviews.title: Une île un petit paradis
reviews.text: La prise des repas à l'hébergement est fortement recommandé une sotie en mer pour pêcher se baigné.... Le rêve

reviews.title: Déçue.
reviews.positives: L'Hôte était accueillante et le prix n'est pas élevé.
reviews.negatives: Nous n'avons pas eu la Chambre réservée, elle était 2fois plus petite. Avec les valises on ne pouvait plus bouger. Il est noté fabuleux mais c'est franchement abusé même si ça reste pas cher. On devait rester 2 nuits on est parti le lendemain matin pour un autre homestay.

reviews.title: Famiglia speciale ed accogliente
reviews.text: È’ stato come sentirsi a casa, ci hanno accolto, coccolato con cene deliziose, aiutato nello spostamento sull’isola. Posto stupendo in mezzo alla natura e a 2 minuti dalla spiaggia principale. Alla partenza hanno regalato a me e alle mie figlie una collanina in conchiglie che terrò sempre come ricordo. Tornerò sicuramente appena ne avrò l’occasione

reviews.title: Bien pour un séjour "Roots"
reviews.positives: Très bon accueil avec une hôtesse qui se met en quaatre pour vous rendre le séjour agréable, organiser un tour en moto, etc
reviews.negatives: Batiment vétuste mais des travux sont prévus

reviews.title: 너무 친절하고 좋습니다!
reviews.text: 베트남 전통 집에서 잤는데 너무 좋고 깨끗하고 사장님도 친절합니다! 또 오고 싶습니다.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Un peu à l’écart du village mais à moins de 10 minutes à pieds

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: Bon point de chute pour une nuit sur l’ile Cham
reviews.positives: Réservation facile, bon emplacement, prix très abordable
reviews.negatives: Chambre et sanitaires sommaires

reviews.title: Sạch sẽ, mát mẻ, gần bãi tắm
reviews.text: Rất hài lòng

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.positives: Les hôtes sont très gentils. Le logement est simple un peu vétuste mais pour 1 nuit et au prix payé faut pas faire la fine bouche. On a marché 10 mins pour aller à la plage, c’est très calme et à côté de restaurants.
reviews.negatives: La salle de bain mériterait un coup de propre supplémentaire

reviews.title: rất đáng ở
reviews.text: Homestay này nằm khá xa bến tàu nhưng rất sạch sẽ,  đồ dùng trang bị như 1 khách sạn : bàn chải,  kem đánh răng, gel rửa tay,  dầu gội... Chăn đệm sàn nhà đc dọn hàng ngày,  điều hoà chạy tốt.  Nói chung với số tiền bỏ ra mà đc như thế là rất ok với mình.  Đằng sau homestay này là 1 bãi tắm rất đẹp có thể ra đó dựng lều tối ngắm sao.  Mình nhờ cô chủ nấu cho 3 bữa luôn ở đây và rất hợp khẩu vị mình dù mình là người Bắc.  Cô chủ và mấy người phục vụ rất tốt tính y như người trong nhà,  rất tình cảm.  Cô chủ cho thuê xe máy 150k đổ đầy xăng luôn,  cô còn tìn thuyền ghép đi quanh đảo xem san hô có 100k. Cù lao chàm có phía đảo ngắm mặt trời mọc đã bị sạt lở đi rất nguy hiểm.  Hiện nay cung đường này bị chặn ko đi đc.  Phía ngắm hoàng hôn thì đẹp vô cùng và vô số bãi tắm rất đẹp. Bọn sungroup đang xây 1 Resort ở đây nên hôm mình đến đường đi bụi mù mịt.  Nói chung nên ở 1 đêm trên đảo và bạn ko nên ở 2 ngày cuối tuần vì rất đông.  Tối ở đây dân đảo chả có hoạt động gì, họ thi nhau hát karaoke bằng loa kéo ầm ĩ cũng chán.  1 thời gian nữa ko biết cái đảo này ra sao

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Petite famille très sympathique et accueillante. 

Le petit + : possibilité de louer scooter et équipement de snorkel

Nous reviendrons sans hésiter si nous repassons dans les parages, merci !

reviews.title: Хозяева отеля заслуживают максимальный балл
reviews.text: Остановились здесь на 3 ночи. Номер небольшой, с кондиционером и вентилятором. Единственный минус был это отсутствие холодильника в номере. В остальном все отлично. Хозяева замечательные люди. Спасибо вам за теплый прием. Если я когда-то вернусь на этот остров, то я снова остановлюсь в Trang Vu Homestay

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Emplacement au calme mais proche du port à pied.
Possibilité de louer un scooter directement sur place ainsi que masques et tuba
Chambre simple mais très propre et suffisante.
Hôtes très agréables et à la recherche du service (voir avec eux pour le speedboat aller retour).
reviews.negatives: RAS

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room was truly beautiful, but don’t expect too much – it’s a local story when you are living with Vietnamese family and see their environment. Owners were super friendly and welcoming.. You can find everything that you need for peaceful vacation – beach nearby, drinking water and even toothpaste!  The family can help you book the tickets for speedboat, which is very convenient. Also they have a bike for rental. Only one thing should be improved it’s breakfast, it was quite poor and oily.  The family gave us presents on our last day, it was super cute! They have only few guests per season,  just wanted to ask you to book a room there and support their small business 🙏🏻❤️ Island now it’s not too touristy, you can get a truly local experience here

reviews.title: Hôtel îles Cham
reviews.positives: Très bon accueil. La dame est venue nous chercher à l'embarcadère pour nous guider et nous a réservé un accueil très chaleureux. L'hôtel est proche d'une magnifique plage, 5 minutes à pied. L'hôtel peut louer des masques et tubas à un prix très raisonnable.

reviews.title: Easy stay in a great location
reviews.text: We were satisfied,the owners are nice people (helpful as well) .  Best beach on the Island is few minutes walk and the port with all the reastaurants and shops are also very near.  Great,Just enjoy your stay !

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Tres bonne situation géographique, a l écart !
A 5 minutes à pied du centre et à 5 minutes à pied d'une des plus belle plage de l île ! 
Chambre confortable avec climatisation!
Hote serviable
Très bon rapport qualité prix
Je recommande

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: So helpful and nice people. My scooter broke down on the other side of the island and they came and fixed it and helped me without charging. Super friendly and nice family!

reviews.title: Maison simple mais extrêmement chaleureuse
reviews.positives:
Pour notre 2ème séjour en 7 ans, madame Vu et sa maman sont toujours aussi chaleureuses. Vous être comme chez vous. L'expression "Vivre chez l'habitant" prend ici tout son sens. La cuisine est très gouteuse, abordable et typique. Tout ce qui se trouve au marché peut être cuisiné par la propriétaire de la maison.
Les plages sont facilement accessibles. Notre hôte nous a prêté gracieusement sa mobilette pour s'y rendre. Pas besoin de faire de circuit ou d'excursion, longer simplement la route et nagez entre 2 plages pour observer les coraux et poissons en snorkeling. Le centre est très paisible une fois le flow de touristes passé
reviews.negatives: La maison est rudimentaire, très typique du confort d'une maison vietnamienne. Ce n'est pas ici que vous trouverez votre hotel étoilé. Vous êtes chez l'habitant

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Une famille très accueillante et généreuse chez qui nous avons passé un très bon séjour !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nous avons adoré notre court séjour à Cham. Nos hôtes sont adorables et ont organisé nos transports pour venir et partir de l'ile. Nous avons facilement pu louer scooter et matériel de snorkelling et nous avons reçu d'excellents conseils pour visiter l'ile. Nous recommandons vivement ce logement. La chambre est agréable et avec un excellent rapport qualité-prix.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Excellent accueil dans une famille aux petits soins . Très bon emplacement.  Je recommande fortement.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Excellent emplacement, la dame et son fils sont très accueillants et arrangeants. Le fils se débrouille en anglais et il est ainsi assez simple de communiquer. Location de scooter possible. Le lit était confortable. 
Je recommande à 100%, ils sont adorables et aux petits soins !
reviews.negatives: Tout était parfait

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Très calme, à 5 minutes à pied du centre avec les restaurants et le port de l'ile. Personnel chaleureux et serviable. Parfait pour se reposer.
reviews.negatives: Dommage que les rideaux laissent passer le soleil.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Cette famille est vraiment très gentille et bienveillante ! Toujours prêt à tout faire pour nous satisfaire !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: J’ai passé deux jours fabuleux au sein cet Homestay, je remercie l’accueil et la bienveillance de cette famille, les chambres sont très bien équipés, on est venu me chercher à mon arrivée et j’ai eu à disposition un scooter. Le repas était délicieux, je recommande cet homestay et je reviendrai à coup sûr lors d’un prochain voyage au Vietnam. Merci et prenez soin de vous!

reviews.title: Une jolie pause sur une île magnifique
reviews.positives: Non loin du port, un peu en retrait au calme, les petites chambres sont propres et la famille est charmante et aux petits soins ! Et l’île de Cham est magnifique ! À recommander si vous passez par Hoi An, c’est à 20mn en bateau !

reviews.title: On y retourne
reviews.positives:
Excellent accueil . Ambiance amicale et confiante. Chambres propres et confortables.
Repas sur place possibles de qualité. Location de moto. On y retourne volontiers. Très bon rapport qualité prix.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Le personnel et l’emplacement sont géniales ! Je recommande vivement
reviews.negatives: La wifi ne marche pas très bien dans les chambre mais fonctionne à l’accueil

reviews.title: Très agréable.
reviews.positives: Très bien situé. Nous avons pu alterner excursion et plage la plus proche pendant les 5 jours où nous avons séjourné ici. Les hôtes sont très gentils et nous ont aidé à organiser aussi bien les transports que les activités sur place. La chambre est très petite mais cela est compensé par des espaces communs agréables.

reviews.title: On y revient
reviews.positives:
Second séjour. Toujours aussi sympathique. 
Accueil remarquable : réservation du speedboat A/R, accueil au port et transfert à la guest-house, location de motos, repas de fruits de mer sur place, petits déjeuners...et la gentillesse des hôtes.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tout ! Une famille incroyable et un emplacement parfait. Je recommande ! Ils se sont occupés de tout et étaient aux petits soins.

reviews.title: Île de repos
reviews.positives: La famille qui nous reçoit a été super, toujours prête à nous aider et très chaleureuse et touchante
reviews.negatives: Le réveil par le message du gouvernement par haut-parleurs  à 5h30 du matin tous les jours pendant au moins 1hr mais rien à voir avec le homestay, c' est comme ça presque partout au Vietnam, il faut s'habituer

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Nous avons passé 2 nuits chez Trang et c’était comme à la maison. 
Nous avons aimé l’accueil et la générosité de notre hôte. Elle nous a offert des fruits, le repas le jour du départ…Les repas sont très copieux, Trang est aux petits soins avec nous. La plage à 5mn à pieds est magnifique. Très peu de touriste, pourtant nous y sommes venus le week-end. Nous avons loué des scooters pour se balader sur l’île et fait du snorkeling au sud de l’île ( durée 3h)
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Un accueil hors du commun.
Nous avons passé deux jours exceptionnels ici. Toute la famille nous a chaleureusement accueillis. De nombreuses attentions tout au long du séjour.
L'homestay est bien située : à 10 min du port et à 5 min d'une très belle plage.
La famille propose de nombreuses activités

reviews.title: Un accueil exceptionnel 🤩
reviews.positives:
Nous avons passé deux jours fabuleux ici. Toute la famille nous a chaleureusement accueillis avec de nombreuses attentions tout au long du séjour.
L'homestay est bien située : à 10 min du port et à 5 min d'une très belle plage.
La famille propose de nombreuses activités.

reviews.title: Wurden woanders hin geschickt was nicht gut war
reviews.positives: Vermieter sehr nett und hat uns boot besorgt und einen roller gegeben.  Wasser zum nachfüllen
reviews.negatives: 1. Tag vorher teilte er mir mit, das er doch Keim Zimmer hat und uns woanders hin schickt. Würde 300 m weiter in ein homestay gebracht was wirklich noch mehr als einfach war. Kein warmes Wasser und alles sehr alt. Aber Hauptproblem waren die feiernden vietnamesischen Gäste,  welche bis spät in die macht und berteits morgens um 6 wieder vor unserem Zimmer saßen und unglaublich laut waren. Wie das homestay welches ich buchte also.wirklich ist, kann ich nicht sagen.

reviews.title: Es war in Ordnung
reviews.positives: Die Aussicht auf die Berge der Insel. Der günstige Schnorchelausflug (200.000 Dong für 2 Stunden bei der kleinen Insel vor der Hauptinsel). Das hat die Besitzerin ganz unkompliziert und günstig organisiert!
reviews.negatives: Ich fühlte mich nicht sehr willkommen und auch die Kommunikation war sehr schwierig. Das Bett war sehr weich und es war auch nicht sehr sauber. Andererseits darf man auf dieser kleinen und sehr authentischen Insel, auf die hauptsächlich Tagestouristen kommen auch nicht viel erwarten.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Gute Lage, sind freundlich empfangen worden. Sprechen kein Englisch aber mit Übersetzer, Händen und Füßen klappt es. 
Zimmer sind einfach gehalten so wie man es für ein Homestay erwartet. Balkon und Aufenhaltsbereich sond schön gestaltet.
reviews.negatives: Es war einfach nicht sauber, eher dreckig. Die Regale mussten wir erstmal putzen bevor wir was ablegen konnten. Auch der Waschbecken bereich ist vermutlich seit 3 Buchungen nicht gereinigt worden und es kommt braunes Wasser aus dem Hahn.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Gute Lage, nahe zum Zentrum, aber doch ein wenig ruhiger.
Sehr hilfsbereite und freundliche Familie. In der Nähe eines schönen Strandes.
Zimmer sind einfach, aber mit Nötigem (AC, Ventilator und Moskitobett) ausgestattet.

reviews.title: Großartige Zeit
reviews.positives: Die Gastfreundlichkeit und Hilfsbereitschaft der Gasgeber ermöglichte uns eine entspannte und stressfreie Zeit auf der Insel. Ganz lieben Dank für eure Hilfsbereitschaft. Wir kommen gerne wieder.
reviews.negatives: Nichts

reviews.title: Entspannung und Erholung pur
reviews.positives:
Die Eigentümer*innen waren super toll. Wir bekamen Gebäck und Mangos geschenkt und sie kümmerten sich um alles, was wir brauchten. 
Auch ein shuttleservice (for free) zur Fähre boten sie uns an. Wir würden absolut wieder kommen um etwas Ruhe auf der Insel zu finden.
reviews.negatives: Eigl hat uns alles gefallen es ist halt recht einfach gehalten.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Absolute Empfehlung! Wir waren 5 Tage hier und es war wirklich super! Die Zimmer sind sehr schön eingerichtet, sauber, die Betten bequem und es gibt Mückennetzte. Draußen gibt es auch genug Plätze zum sitzen und es liegt sehr nah am Strand. Die Familie war super lieb und sehr hilfsbereit! Wir haben Abends von ihnen leckeres Obst bekommen und wurden auch zum Reis essen eingeladen. Des weiteren haben sie nicht nur die Fährtickets gebucht sondern auch unsere Sachen zum Fähranleger gefahren. Wir hatten hier eine wunderschöne Zeit!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: - eine absolut tolle Familie, die Mutter ist eine sehr liebenswerte und nette Person sie hat unserer Tochter sogar Kleidung als Geschenk vom Markt mitgebracht. Der Sohn ist ein sehr fröhlicher und hilfsbereiter Mensch. Unbedingt Fähre über den Sohn buchen da sich Anfahrtszeiten ständig ändern.
reviews.negatives: Dass wir nur 4 Tage hier waren ...

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Mir hat es richtig gut auf der Insel gefallen, weshalb ich gleich noch einen Tag länger geblieben bin. Trang und ihr Sohn sind die besten Gastgeber, die ich mit wünschen könnte. Sie sind immer hilfsbereit, immer freundlich und zugewandt. Sie geben die besten Tipps für die Inselerkundung. Die Zimmer sind einfach, haben aber alles, was man braucht. Das Fahrrad bekam ich sogar kostenlos. Es lohnt sich aber eine Erkundung mit dem Motorrad um die wunderschöne, noch authentische Insel.
reviews.negatives: Die Fernbedienungen für die Klimaanlage sollten mal ausgetauscht werden und die Badezimmertüre repariert.

reviews.title: Ein traumhaftes Erlebnis für Naturliebhaber am menschenleeren Stränden
reviews.positives: Die Familie ist liebenswert und hat sich für all meine Belange gekümmert. Es hat sich sozusagen eine Freundschaft entwickelt. Buchen Sie hier, denn das sind meine Beweggründe: hervorragendes Preis- Leistungsverhältnis. Bestaunen Sie lebende Korallenriffe. Erkundschaften Sie mit dem Motorrad die Insel und bestaunen Sie den Leuchtturm. Schnorcheln im glasklarem Wasser, Korallen, bunte Fische unmittelbar vor Ihren Augen in nur 5 Meter Wassertiefe. Frischer Fisch schmeckt gegrillt einfach traumhaft, was Sie hier erleben können. Highlight für mich war, mir dem Vater bei Nacht Tintenfische zu Angeln. Ein unvergessliches Erlebnis. Mit dem Sohn habe ich jeden Abend am Strand Tintenfische geangelt. Er zeigt Ihnen, wie man das macht.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ich hatte einen wunderbaren Aufenthalt. Alle waren sehr hilfsbereit, haben das Ticket für's Boot organisiert und mir Tipps gegeben. Hier würde ich nochmal hin kommen. Vielen Dank für alles!

reviews.title: Gerne wieder.
reviews.positives: Die besitzer sind freundlich und hilfsbereit. Jedoch Kommunikation nur per app. Wurde von der/zur fähre per mofa abgeholt inkl. Gepäck, hatte eine schiene an der hand. Fuhr mich, um eine neue sonnenbrille zu besorgen. Nach dem auschecken, durfte ich die private dusche benutzen. Gratis wasser, zum abschied, gabs ein armband.
reviews.negatives: Nur kaltes wasser in der dusche, aber bei den heissen themperaturen wars eine Erfrischung.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Die Unterkunft ist wunderbar!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Letti di cemento veramente. Difficoltà nel trovare informazioni. Noi avevamo una camera doppia ma ci ha dato una quadrupla in due stavamo benissimo usando l'altro letto come appoggio, per quattro sarebbe stata piccola.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La gentilezza della famiglia e la volontà di aiutarci in qualsiasi situazione. Dopo una prima notte in una stanza piccola ci hanno spostato al piano terra in una stanza più grande. Son riusciti a portare tutte le nostre valigie al porto e ritorno su un motorino!
reviews.negatives: Per il prezzo pagato non possiamo lamentarci di nulla! Manca qualche confort ma è tutto in linea con lo spirito dell’isola e il prezzo pagato.

reviews.title: Molto soddisfatto …
reviews.positives: Ottima struttura, proprietaria di casa accogliente dove in due giorni più volte mi ha offerto da mangiare …  a cinque minuti a piedi da una spiaggia piena di palme e sabbia bianca  … incredibile
reviews.negatives: Nel complesso tutto bene, forse il bagno un po’ piccolino , ma con 8-9 euro per notte però una caverà privata non si può pretendere di più .. Struttura consigliata

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La proprietaria è stata super disponibile, ha cercato di aiutarmi in tutti i modi e di farmi sentire a casa nelle fantastiche Cham Island: consigliato! ISOLE FANTASTICHE

reviews.title: Molto gentili ed accoglienti
reviews.positives: Lo staff è stato molto gentile e disponibile.per via del maltempo alcune persone sono rimaste bloccate sull'isola per tanto la nostra stanza non era libera MA ci hanno trovato tempestivamente un'altra altra soluzione e non abbiamo assolutamente risentito. Le stanze erano comode e pulite.

reviews.title: Famiglia molto disponibile, ci hanno aiutato anche a prenotare la speedboat! Sistemazione spartana ma comoda
reviews.positives: Posizione molto comoda, la famiglia è molto ospitale e anche senza parlare inglese riescono a comunicare il necessario, la struttura è spartana ma pulita e l’aria condizionata funziona alla perfezione.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La stanza è semplice ma ben tenuta, la posizione è tranquilla. La famiglia è molto accogliente e disponibile, pur non parlando bene l’inglese siamo sempre riusciti a capirci. Purtroppo siamo rimasti solo due giorni, speriamo di tornare.

reviews.title: Sentirsi a casa a oltre 8.000 km di distanza
reviews.positives:
In una parola questo posto è CASA.
Mi sono innamorata dell'isola di Cu Lao Cham di questa homestay e soprattutto della famiglia di mamma Trang. 
Le stanze sono semplici e pulite, l'aria condizionata funziona bene, la mamma e la nonna vi faranno sempre trovare il te pronto e si prenderanno cura di voi, le amache per rilassarsi sono un plus.
Consiglio a tutti questa homestay e se mai tornerò in Vietnam sicuramente tornerò qui.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: il verde intorno e l'accoglienza
reviews.negatives: niente

reviews.title: Prima
reviews.positives: Prijs kwaliteit prima!
reviews.negatives: gehuurde brommers vielen tegen remmen niet in orde en motoren sloegen af. Wel iets van gezegd maar werd niets mee gedaan.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Fijn verblijf gehad bij lieve mensen die heel erg hun best doen om je verblijf zo fijn en prettig mogelijk te laten verlopen!

reviews.title: Echte homestay op Chàm island
reviews.positives: Een echte homestay bij een Vietnamees gezin. We werden samen met de andere gasten uitgenodigd om een avond mee te eten, super lief. De familie wil alles voor je regelen. Communicatie via de app en Google translate gaat prima.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Prachtige lokatie, zeer lief gastgezin. Willen je overal mee helpen. Snorkels liggen klaar. Gezellig een drankje drinken in de gezamenlijke ruimte. Geweldig eiland met een heel relaxte sfeer!

reviews.title: Geweldig!
reviews.positives: Wat een fijne familie van de homestay. Ze hielpen ons met alles. Brommers huren, snorkel maskers, duiktrip; niets was teveel! De accommodatie is basic maar dat is het hele eiland. Om te betalen met de credit card moesten we achterop de brommer naar het enige restaurant waar dat kon. Verder een fantastisch eiland met prachtige stranden, mooie natuur, veel apen en fijne restaurantjes met seafood. Een enorme aanrader wat ons betreft!
reviews.negatives: Als je niet van basic houdt moet je niet naar de Cham islands gaan; maar dan mis je wel wat!

reviews.title: Gewoonweg fantastisch!
reviews.positives: Eigenlijk alles!
reviews.negatives: Geen opmerking

reviews.title: Perfect.
reviews.positives: De liefste personen van Vietnam zitten daar. De familie laat je voelen alsof je één van hun bent. In alles nemen ze je mee en ze bieden alles aan. Wij hebben ons daar ontzettend warm en welkom gevoeld! Als het kon, bleven we daar langer.
reviews.negatives: Niks.

reviews.title: אירוח אצל משפחה מקסימה! לא חסר דבר והחדרים נעימים. ממליצה בחום!
reviews.positives:
מקום באי מקסים. 
נעים להתארח אצל המשפחה , מרגיש כמו בבית והכל בחיוך. 
החדר נקי , מים חמים במקלחת, יש מיזוג אוויר.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Cô chú dễ thương

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Chủ quán nấu ăn ngon, nhiệt tình hỗ trợ khách
reviews.negatives: Cạnh cửa sổ có phế liệu

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Vị trí gần bãi tắm, gần khu trung tâm để đi chơi và mua sắm nhưng rất mát mẻ và yên tĩnh. Chị chủ homestay cực kỳ thân thiện, tốt bụng. Giá cả rất rẻ và hợp lý

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Chủ nhà dễ thương
reviews.negatives: Đồ ăn ngon

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Scooteri on vanha ja rikki en suosittelen vuokrata scooteria

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Локация

reviews.title: Очень рекомендую!
reviews.positives: Стабильный вайфай, кондиционер и вентилятор в номере. Свой туалет и душ.
reviews.negatives: Сложно найти, от причала минут 10-15 пешком.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Просто замечательное место! Провела там около недели с большим удовольствием, ни разу не испытала какого-то дискомфорта. Отличный душ без скачков температуры.  Очень душевные хозяева - реально как дома. Пляж совсем рядом (надо быть аккуратным с падающими кокосами). Очень вкусный утренний суп в двух шагах от хоумстея, главное - не проспать)))

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Уютное место, тихо, до порта и ресторанов пешком по тенистой улочке 5 мин неспешным шагом. Чисто, запахов нет. Вода бесплатно в кулерах. Если спросишь, давали в бутылках из холодильника. Очень приятные хозяева, каждый день угощали фруктами. Забронировали нам проезд на катере, предоставили байк в аренду. Мы очень довольны проживанием.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Небольшой семейный отель, нахрдится в тихом месте. До порта 10 мин пешком. Отличное место. Хозяин гостеприимеый парень Ту, все рассказал куда сьездить, что посмотреть. Если что было необходимо , все решалось. На острове очень понравилось
reviews.negatives: Нет

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Все хорошо, спасибо за гостеприимство.
Желаем вам процветания.
reviews.negatives: Москитных сеток нет на окнах 😢

reviews.title: Хороший хоумстей.
reviews.positives: Очень приятные гостеприимные хозяева. Делали все для комфортного проживания. В номере чисто и опрятно. Всегда вода из кулера питьевая и горячая в душе. Близко к одному из красивых пляжей. Мы были с дочкой и нас часто угощали едой.
reviews.negatives: Соседи были часто шумными. Еще что-то жужжало типо станции по накачиванию воды. Но я думаю это в цело на всем острове так.

reviews.title: Замечательное место с очень добрым владельцем!
reviews.positives: Чистый светлый номер, есть кондиционер, вентилятор. В ванной комнате проточный нагреватель с регулировкой температуры и хорошим напором воды, невероятно удобно! Большая кровать с хорошим матрасом. Расположение удачное - 10 минут пешком от порта, 10 минут пешком до красивого пляжа. Есть скутеры для аренды. Очень дружелюбный и добрый владелец!!! ❤️

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Очень доброжелательная семья, угощали чаем, фруктами, все постояльцы также были дружелюбные, добрая атмосфера, расположение супер, пляж в 5-10 минутах, немного удален от шумного порта, вид с балкона на горы, кровати удобные, очень рекомендую

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Я очень доволен своим отдыхом в Trang Vu Homestay Cù Lao Chàm. 
Очень приветливая и заботливая семья  проявлявшая тёплую и искреннюю вьетнамскую гостеприимность и дружелюбие , а так же  заботу и внимание. Они  всегда были готовы помочь, даже несмотря на языковой барьер.
Месторасположение  отличное: всего в нескольких минутах от пляжа Bãi Ông и недалеко от центра острова с кафе и магазинами.
Номер был чистым, с кондиционером и всем необходимым для комфортного отдыха. Атмосфера очень спокойная и расслабляющая, я отлично высыпался после насыщенного дня на пляже и прогулок по острову.
Это идеальный выбор для тех, кто хочет провести время на Cù Lao Chàm в уютной, домашней обстановке, с отличным соотношением цены и качества.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Все понравилось!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Все понравилось! Снимали три номера, себе и друзьям , все остались довольны!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Рекомендую данное место, хозяева приветливые! Номера простенькие, но все идеально чисто и есть все необходимое для проживания. Так же расположение очень удобное, минуты 3 до пляжа и минут 5-7 неторопливым шагом до пристани

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: отдыхаем здесь уже третий раз, очень нравиться. Классное расположение,рядом пляж, как из рекламы Баунти! Если пройти 2,3 километра дикие пляжи где вообще никого нет, чистый океан , коралловые рифы. Хозяева очень приятные, гостеприимные , очень вкусно готовят. Если отдохнуть от суеты, только сюда. Большое спасибо хозяевам за отдых!!!
reviews.negatives: ничего не

reviews.title: Милый дом
reviews.positives: Всё очень понравилось с первого взгляда и остров и дом этой чудесной семьи. Мы сначала забронировали 4 ночи, но потом решили остаться ещё подольше. Это действительно то место, где можно расслабиться и чувствовать себя как дома. Хозяйка внимательная, заботливая и очень вкусно готовит! Обязательно приедем ещё.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Приезжаем второй раз, очень нравится ,хозяева очень доброжелательные,встречают провожают,довозят на байке. Хорошее расположение,рядом пляж. Хозяйка хорошо готовит. Надеемся приехать ещё.

reviews.title: Все было здорово
reviews.positives: Хозяева отеля очень доброжелательные и приятные, накормили нас в первый день  приветственным и очень вкусным ужином совершенно бесплатно. Также у них сразу взяли байк в аренду с полным баком бензина. Отлично говорят на английском.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Sympatyczni właściciele, na miejscu można wypożyczyć skuter
reviews.negatives: Bardzo daleko na najpiękniejszą plażę i do centrum, dziury w ścianach przez co klimatyzacja nie jest w stanie schłodzić pokoju , ciasno i niezbyt czysto

reviews.title: Dejligt
reviews.positives:
Dejligt og personligt. Familieejet. 
Autentisk. God placering på øen. Virkelig god pris! Mulighed for at leje scooter.
reviews.negatives: Det er et lidt mere simpelt hjem men det var fint til os. Vandvarmeren havde ikke meget varmt vand.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Čista soba, udoban krevet, sjajna lokacija. Porodica je veoma prijatna i gostoljubiva, zaista sam se osećala kao kod kuće.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
place looks fair , 1 km from center , clean ,
good hospitality ( willing to
assist your needs).

reviews.title: You get what you pay for. Nice very basic place if you want some place just to sleep somewhere and spend rest of your ti
reviews.positives: Location was nice, very quiet location, very cheap, family dont speak much of an English apart from son, but they tried :)
reviews.negatives:
Colour from the walls was falling off, it's just a very basic room with no comfortable place to Sit and chill and whole place just looked very runed down and couldn't see anyone doing anything about it.

Only thing I can say, you get what you pay for :)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
- People tried the best and they are super friendly
- They offered to bring me to the ferry by motorbike
reviews.negatives:
- we could not lock the room door from inside
- breakfast not really worth the money
- all really really basic
- A monkey destroyed my shoes

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The room is really cool, the bed is big and really comfortable 
Good location

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The kindness of the family, their availabilitay, the location nearby the beach and the center, the bed's size.
reviews.negatives: It wasn't easy to get all the informations because they don't speak a perfect English, but they do try their best and are really adorable.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good position, clean, she picked me up at the port for free. Nice common spaces to know people.
reviews.negatives: Very low water pressure in the shower and the curtains were transparent, so at sunrise the light comes inside the room.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The place is very close to the pier and the owner was to kind to come and pick us up:) She was very nice, she booked to boat tickets and also organized a private boat trip in the afternoon for us, we loved it!
reviews.negatives: Everything was ok! Communication in English was a little tricky, but worked out in the end!

reviews.title: Nice place. Good location. Lovely People. Great Price.
reviews.positives:
I stayed for a week at Trang Vu Homestay and thoroughly enjoyed my time there. The accommodation is basic but comfortable and represents excellent value for money. It’s in a good location, up a quiet side road just a couple of minutes’ stroll from the smaller of the two harbours. The second, larger bay, is a few minutes’ further on. There are plenty of good restaurants within easy walking distance, many overlooking the bay. There’s a nice sandy beach a short walk away that also has a few restaurants. The family running the homestay are lovely: very friendly and helpful. I didn’t have a fridge in my room but could get chilled beer from the fridge in the lobby along with a large thermos of chunky ice. I was often given free fruit and, when I came to leave, my luggage was taken to the harbour for free. There’s also plenty of snorkelling gear available that is free to borrow. 
Oh, I should also mention that free filtered water is available. As well as being more eco-friendly, it saves you the time, money and effort of having to get the bottled stuff.
reviews.negatives: A few times there were problems with my air-con but these were quickly fixed. In fact, having seen how the fix was done, I learned how to do it myself. It was nothing serious and did not adversely affect how much I enjoyed staying there.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Lovely family, location is very good, very quiet, clean bedroom and air conditioning works perfect.
reviews.negatives: As many places in Vietnam the comunication is difficult even with translator or messages.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
The hosts are very kind and helpful. There is a language barrier but nothing that google translate may not solve. 
I liked to have the beach 4minutes away by walk and to be not far from the main village. Room cleaned (had some ants on the second day but got cleaned after I asked). 
Neighbourhood a bit noisy but stop karaoke at 22:30 the latest.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
The accommodation met all of our expectations. We only stayed one night but were perfectly comfortable and the owner had the room ready for us to check in early when the boat arrived.
 The owner was extremely helpful organising the boat as a very last minute request (I recommend this service as otherwise it is quite complicated). We also rented a scooter for the day which was very reasonably priced and fun for getting around. Although the hosts don't speak English it was easy to communicate with Google translate. The room had air con and a fan which was definitely needed! The location is perfect for getting to the beach and the village. The hosts gave us a small gift as we left which was very sweet of them. Beautiful view at sunrise.
reviews.negatives: Nothing - the accommodation is basic but that is what we expected. Very good value for money.

reviews.title: The best hostess you'll ever find
reviews.positives:
Ms. Trang is the best hostess you'll ever find. I can't thank her enough for all she did while my husband and I stayed at her homestay - sometimes she'd just surprise us with a free meal, or an orange juice when it was too hot, helped my husband prepare a surprise for my birthday,... It was just great.

The room was small but absolutely fine for us, and it was very tidy and clean. At night, it was very peaceful and quiet which was perfect for a good night of sleep and rest.

If we ever return to the Cham Islands, we'll definitely stay with Ms. Trang again. Absolutely recommended.
reviews.negatives: Absolutely nothing.

reviews.title: A lovely genuine stay, and excellent value
reviews.positives: Trang and Vu were exceptional hosts and looked after us incredibly well.  It felt  a true and genuine experience of the best of Vietnam.  They didn’t push anything, but offered tea or food, and helped us when we needed it.  They sorted the boat out for a cheaper price, in advance, and also provided transport to/ from the pier.  The rooms are basic but clean.  Free water is available and green tea is offered in the afternoon, and there is a lovely view over the valley.  After a few days there we felt so relaxed we didn’t want to leave.  We liked the location as it was only a short 5 min walk into town, and we enjoyed experiencing and seeing village life.  For us, it was better than staying in the noisier hustle and bustle of the pier.  Ko Lao Cham is charming and definately worth the effort of getting there.
reviews.negatives:
Nothing 

Just be ready for the early 6am government wake up call, but even this is an interesting cultural experience!  And we loved it.  This island goes to bed early and gets up early.

reviews.title: Relaxation
reviews.positives: The family was very nice and helpful the room was clean and private I slept in everyday. 5 min walk to a beautiful beach 20 to another south of town and 30-40 to one before the next town. You have to give notice if you want to eat at the home stay in advance the day of. The food was delicious too large portions of well flavored fish rice and soup. I would definitely recommend staying here if you have the chance. It’s a 10 min walk from the ferry also.
reviews.negatives: I think the worst thing was the location as you were more so on the north side of the island. But there is a motorbike you can rent at a good price.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great, quiet place with amazing helpful hosts. We were enjoying this place a lot.

reviews.title: The hosts are incredibly kind.
reviews.positives: The property matches the pictures.

reviews.title: A friendly welcome awaits
reviews.positives: Very friendly and welcoming family, clean room with air con and very close to the beaches. They were able to organise scooter rental easily. A great place to stay!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The owner and it's family were so kind and helpful. 
They came to pick us up and drop us off at the harbour. We are always greeted with a smile or cup of tea or some fruits.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great accommodation on the island in a small fishing village. The owner is very kind and takes care of everything you need. It’s just a short walk from the beach, and the place is clean and comfortable. Definitely recommended!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We spent an amazing time at Trang Vu Homestay. The service was impeccable, the family welcomed u

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The family is very friendly and welcoming, they will help you with anything you need and sometimes invite you to dinner. The place has everything (including water purifiers) and is well kept.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Perfect location and new shower in the room. The owners helped us with info about the island.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Lovely family helped me to buy ticket to the island and invited all guests for a lunch before TET. Room was clean, bed comfortable, new electric shower.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great place to stay near the beach. Family hosting us was incredibly generous and helpful. They helped us get cheap ferry tickets and arranges motorbikes and snorkelling kits for a very reasonable price. Would definitely come back!

reviews.title: Very nice place and location
reviews.positives: We liked it a lot, room was comfortable with hot water and close to the restaurants. It is just a few minutes away from the beach. Nice warm family

reviews.title: Super family Trang Vu
reviews.positives: Comfortable accommodation with a large Vietnamese family.It was good to feel the local flavor.By the standards of this small island, everything is close by.Everything was great! Thank you!

reviews.title: A really warm family stay, a clean comfortable room and a perfect location close to everything.
reviews.positives:
We really loved staying at Trang Vu Homestay. The family running the place is genuinely warm and welcoming and made everything easy for us from the moment we arrived.

Our room was big, very clean and comfortable, and we slept really well. The location is also super convenient. It is very close to the main port where all the restaurants are, and the beach is just a short walk away, so getting around the island was simple.

The food was honestly amazing and some of our favourite meals on Cu Lao Cham. We would absolutely stay here again and would happily recommend this homestay to anyone visiting the island.
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: 5/6 walk from Main Strip, family was super friendly and accommodating,rooms are small and compact, Ac works good, ju
reviews.positives:
Super friendly family! limited English but you can’t expect the world to speak your language. Google translate works well. lots of tourist get frustrated due to language barrier and are impatient. 
This is island life, simple and slow, no rush, no hot water in rooms but shared bathroom has hot ish water and toilet. Doubt you will want a hot shower anyway.
Toilets in bedrooms are basic and you won’t hide anything from your partner/family/friends.
Shared kitchen, again basic but works just the same, not for you fancy people. Perfect if you want to experience the Vietnamese island life.

Motorbike hire price includes fuel.
We spent a week, did the whole island.
reviews.negatives: The one dog that barks all night, I chased him down the street and he shut up hahaha

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wonderful family run property

reviews.title: Quét and comfortable
reviews.positives: Quite basic accommodation, but us everything you need. The staff were friendly and helpful. Picked us up from the ferry and we were able to rent a motor bike and snorkel.

reviews.title: Peaceful stay with a family onCham island
reviews.positives: Lovely homestay just off from the main town and near the beautiful Ong beach. There’s an amazing noodle place next door. The family were so accommodating and the room was nice and bright. It’s a 20 minute walk from Xep beach and 10 minutes from the middle of town so it’s peaceful but walkable from everywhere. I would stay again if I return to Cham:) Thank you for the necklace!!!!
reviews.negatives: Air con in room but I couldn’t get it it work, there was a working fan but it was very warm during the day

reviews.title: What a nice place
reviews.positives:
The staff is very nice ! Comes get you from the boat to the hotel with scooters and offers to bring you back to the boat when you leave.
You can rent scooter to explore the island.
We even got bracelets at the end !
Good memory !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Beautyful room with own bathroom and nice View. Calm but Close to Center and beautyful beaches by foot. Lovin Family so caring and helpful with everything we asked. 
The Host Mamma IS a great Cook and she and her Family are  generous Loving warm and friendly. You can rent  good Googles / snorkel motorbike and Bicicle Here and they helped us booking the Speed boat and getting information about possibilitys. WE stayed over a week and longer than intended and are still sad to leave. 
You can See beautyful coralls and sealive directly from the beach by yourself so for me and my Daughter was perfect.
 Thank you for a fantastic stay! WE d Love to come Back Here!

Cam on!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was great, I strongly recommand this place.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff went out of there way to make sure we had a great stay

reviews.title: The owner was absolutely amazing, she helped us so much and we couldn’t recommend staying here more.
reviews.positives: It is spacious, clean and super comfortable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice family home stay. Rooms were small but comfortable. Had air con and a fan. Friendly family. Good location. Can rent motorbikes from them. Great value for money.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Cham island was a suggested destination of a dear friend. It has amazing beaches (one of the best at 5 minutes walk from the homestay) and a cool fisherman's village vibe. For sure not for parties although there are quite a few bars. The homestay is conveniently located just outside the village, 5 minutes walk from it and same to Ong beach. The family is extremely kind and helpful and they offer bike and scooter rental for a good price and also every meal if you tell in advance. The room was a decent size and clean.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was perfect! I had the most wonderful stay! The location is great, very short walk to both the main town where the boat arrives and where there are lots of restaurants etc, as well as a very short walk to the nearest beach. In a very calm, peaceful and beautiful authentic area. The building is fantastic with a lovely terrace overlooking nature, the interior is beautifully decorated and feels homely. The room was clean and comfortable . The best part was the host! Such a kind, warm, and welcoming family who helped me with so much and provided a free pick-up and drop-off to the boat. I would love stay again and would highly recommend to everyone!

reviews.title: Cosy comfy clean
reviews.positives: Everything. Owner was very cheeful and helped me in whatever ways she could. Very genuine person. Rooms were clean and comfy. The patio was really nice and chill to hang out and catch the sunrise. A stones throw to a beach with beautiful coconut trees lined up. Her serene guesthouse is a nice getaway from the bustling crowd.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: The host was so lovely to us like a mother , she fed us dinner and breakfast and told us so many good things to do in th
reviews.positives: The most beautiful place to stay with rice rooms and the best views

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was great! We really enjoyed our stay here and would recommend it to everyone. The house lady was so sweet and welcoming, she really went the extra mile to make us feel taken cared of! Thank you so much for everything!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: I initially only planned to stay for 2 nights. I extended my trip to two weeks as i fell in love with the island, the ho
reviews.positives: The house is welcoming, light, airy, in a great location and well cared for. The main living room is the heart of the house and is a joy to spend time in. Trang and Vu are exceptional hosts. I’d live here forever if i could.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Lovely family run homestay in an excellent location, really close to a beautiful beach

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Lovely staff, a relaxed vibe, comfortable beds, very clean. The family go out of their way to make you feel at home and welcome.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Friendly Homestay on a beautiful island!!
reviews.positives: The family are very friendly and helpful, there son speaks good English and can help arrange anything you like. They have there own boats to take you snorkeling and can rent you snorkel equipment if you wish to just go to the beaches yourselves. The room is basic but clean and all that you need for a stay on the islands. The breakfast was really good with bread, eggs and delicious fruit! They can also arrange the ferry ticket for a cheap price and will offer to pick you up and drop you off at the ferry pier on the island if you like.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Melhor estadia possível em Cham Island
reviews.positives:
Tudo,
Hospitalidade
Quarto
Localização
reviews.negatives: Nada
